title: Semiconductor device and semiconductor package including the same
abstract: A semiconductor device includes a first semiconductor chip that includes a first conductive pad whose top surface is exposed; and a second semiconductor chip that includes a second conductive pad whose top surface is exposed and in contact with at least a portion of the top surface of the first conductive pad. The first semiconductor chip may include a first diffusion barrier in contact with a bottom surface of the first conductive pad, and a second diffusion barrier in contact with a lateral surface of the first conductive pad, and the first diffusion barrier and the second diffusion barrier may include different materials from each other.
claims: 1. A method of manufacturing a semiconductor package, the method comprising: preparing a first wafer and a second wafer; and bonding the first wafer and the second wafer, wherein preparing the first wafer and the second wafer includes: forming a first diffusion barrier layer on a semiconductor substrate; forming a conductive pad on the first diffusion barrier layer; removing a portion of the first diffusion barrier layer using the conductive pad as a mask; forming a second diffusion barrier layer covering an upper surface and a side surface of the conductive pad; forming a dielectric layer on the second diffusion barrier layer; and performing a planarization process to expose the conductive pad, wherein the forming of the dielectric layer on the second diffusion barrier layer is performed prior to the performing of the planarization process.
